lineup_source: Projected Tunisia 2026 World Cup starting XI under Sabri Lamouchi (4-3-3)

players.name: Aymen Dahmen
players.note: Born in Sfax, Tunisia; no documented foreign parentage found.

players.name: Dylan Bronn
players.note: Born in Cannes, France, to a French father and Tunisian mother.

players.name: Montassar Talbi
players.note: Born in France to Tunisian parents; family moved back to Tunisia when he was young, holds dual Tunisia-France citizenship.

players.name: Mohamed Dräger
players.note: Born in Freiburg, Germany, to a German father and Tunisian mother.

players.name: Yan Valery
players.note: Born in Champigny-sur-Marne, France, to a Martiniquais father and Tunisian mother; previously played for France youth teams.

players.name: Ellyes Skhiri
players.note: Born in Lunel, France, to a Tunisian father and French mother; captains the side.

players.name: Hannibal Mejbri
players.note: Born in Ivry-sur-Seine, France, to Tunisian parents (father Lotfi Mejbri a former footballer); switched from France youth setup to Tunisia.

players.name: Rani Khedira
players.note: Born in Stuttgart, Germany, to a Tunisian father and German mother; brother of former Germany international Sami Khedira.

players.name: Elias Achouri
players.note: Born in Saint-Denis, Réunion (French overseas department), to a Tunisian father and Algerian mother.

players.name: Sebastian Tounekti
players.note: Born in Tromsø, Norway, to a Tunisian father and Norwegian mother.

players.name: Khalil Ayari
players.note: Born in Tunis, Tunisia; no documented foreign parentage found.
